name: HMS Jaseur (J 428)
events: 9 Mar 1945 HMS Unruly (T/Lt. D.J. Palmer, RNVR) conducted A/S exercises off Tobermory with HMS Prompt (T/A/Lt.Cdr. R.K. Hart, RANVR) and HMS Jaseur (T/Lt. R. Kell, RNVR). (1)
10 Mar 1945 HMS Unruly (T/Lt. D.J. Palmer, RNVR) conducted A/S exercises off Tobermory with HMS Prompt (T/A/Lt.Cdr. R.K. Hart, RANVR) and HMS Jaseur (T/Lt. R. Kell, RNVR). (1)

11 Mar 1945 HMS Unruly (T/Lt. D.J. Palmer, RNVR) conducted A/S exercises off Tobermory, first with HMS Prompt (T/A/Lt.Cdr. R.K. Hart, RANVR) and HMS Jaseur (T/Lt. R. Kell, RNVR) and later with HMS Loch More (Lt.Cdr. R.A.D. Cambridge, DSC, RD, RNR) and HMS Weston (T/A/Lt.Cdr. W.P. Chipman, RCNVR) (1)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
